summary: Battle alert cards can now expose a secondary group-response command when an alert resolves to multiple brigades or facility-related units.

build.evidence: Vite production build completed before browser QA.

flow: click secondary group action 全線6旅団

observations.lineIntegrityAlert: 戦線突破危険 exposed 全線6旅団
observations.log: 警報一括対応: 6部隊へ全線後退守備を適用。

flow: inspect existing battle alert cards after group response
verify alert actions and unit-card state on mobile layout

implementedBehavior: line-integrity alerts can resolve all non-retreating player brigades
segment alerts can resolve all brigades assigned to that segment when multiple units are present
structure alerts can resolve assigned defenders plus nearest engineer candidates
group actions use existing StandingOrder/domain command paths instead of a separate shortcut-only state mutation
knownLimitations: group response is preset-based; it does not yet run a deeper staff-planner evaluation
the tactical map remains intentionally horizontally scrollable on mobile
direct drag placement and freehand line drawing remain deferred
